query:
-- Wallet (upsert)
INSERT INTO wallets (userId, balanceUSD, totalDepositedUSD, totalSpentUSD, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (1, '47.50', '100.00', '52.50', NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE balanceUSD = '47.50', totalDepositedUSD = '100.00', totalSpentUSD = '52.50';

-- Wallet transactions (only if not already there)
INSERT IGNORE INTO wallet_transactions (userId, type, amountUSD, balanceAfterUSD, description, reference, status, gateway, createdAt)
VALUES
  (1, 'deposit', '50.00', '50.00', 'Wallet top-up via Paystack', 'PAY_REF_001', 'completed', 'paystack', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 DAY)),
  (1, 'deposit', '50.00', '100.00', 'Wallet top-up via Paystack', 'PAY_REF_002', 'completed', 'paystack', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)),
  (1, 'spend', '12.99', '87.01', 'Order BLX-2026-0001 payment', 'ORD_001', 'completed', 'wallet', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 DAY)),
  (1, 'spend', '22.50', '64.51', 'Order BLX-2026-0002 payment', 'ORD_002', 'completed', 'wallet', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY)),
  (1, 'refund', '8.99', '73.50', 'Refund for Order BLX-2026-0003', 'REF_001', 'completed', 'wallet', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)),
  (1, 'spend', '8.99', '64.51', 'Order BLX-2026-0003 payment', 'ORD_003', 'completed', 'wallet', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY));

-- Support tickets
INSERT INTO support_tickets (userId, subject, category, priority, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
  (1, 'Order BLX-2026-0001 account not working', 'order', 'high', 'open', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 4 DAY), DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 4 DAY)),
  (1, 'Request refund for duplicate order', 'refund', 'medium', 'pending', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY), DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)),
  (1, 'How do I top up my wallet', 'general', 'low', 'resolved', DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 8 DAY), DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY));

-- Ticket message
INSERT INTO ticket_messages (ticketId, senderId, senderRole, message, createdAt)
SELECT t.id, 1, 'user', 'I purchased an account but it is not working. Please help me resolve this issue.', t.createdAt
FROM support_tickets t WHERE t.subject = 'Order BLX-2026-0001 account not working' LIMIT 1;

-- Order items for the already-inserted demo orders
INSERT INTO order_items (orderId, productId, productTitle, quantity, unitPriceUSD, totalPriceUSD, createdAt)
SELECT 60001, (SELECT id FROM products LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0), 'Facebook Aged Account 2018', 1, '12.99', '12.99', NOW()
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM order_items WHERE orderId = 60001);

INSERT INTO order_items (orderId, productId, productTitle, quantity, unitPriceUSD, totalPriceUSD, createdAt)
SELECT 60002, (SELECT id FROM products LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 'Gmail Account Verified', 2, '11.25', '22.50', NOW()
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM order_items WHERE orderId = 60002);

INSERT INTO order_items (orderId, productId, productTitle, quantity, unitPriceUSD, totalPriceUSD, createdAt)
SELECT 60003, (SELECT id FROM products LIMIT 1 OFFSET 2), 'Instagram Account 500 Followers', 1, '8.99', '8.99', NOW()
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM order_items WHERE orderId = 60003);
